titleStmt.title: SII 40.236: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 236. (A.R. No. B. 282 of 1933.) Krōsūru, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a stone set up opposite to the temple of Vēṇugōpālasvāmi.
This is dated Śaka 1496, Bhāva, Māgha, śu. 2, Friday, corresponding to 1575 A.D., January. 14.

Records the establishment of a market and implementation of terms of the kaulu (cowl) at Krōsūru in Bellaṁkoṇḍa-sīma, which was granted by Paruchūri Pāpā-Nāyaniṅgāru, the grandson of Pemmasāni Timmā-Nāyaniṅgāru. It refers to the exemptions given to the merchants relating to the waiver of chhatrisa/āvēdanas or 36 privileges enjoyed by the state. These terms occur in Gajapati and Vijayanagara inscriptions as well.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu Avighnamastu
śrīmadrājādhirājarājaparamēśva
ra śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīraśrīraṁggarāya
dēva mahārāya Ayyavāru vidhyānagara
maṁddu pṛthvīsāmrājyamu cēyucu
ṁḍḍagānu svasti śrī vijayābhyudaya śā
livāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1496 A
gunēṁṭi bhāva saṁvvatsara māgha śu 2
śukravārānapeṁmasāni tiṁmānāyi
niṁgāri pautṛlaina paracūri pāpānāyi
niṁgāri bellaṁkoṁḍḍaśīmalōni krōsūru
nu pēṭagaḍiṁcci saṁtasāgiṁcci nānāpā
ṭaka mūlāla sāgiṁcci kaulu prakārama
yina śilāśāsanamu padēṁḍladāṁkanu
pannu parāmivaḍyaṁ kānikaveṭṭivēmi kōṭni
modalaina chatrani(chatrisa) Āvēdanaluṁnu mānitimi
Aṁttanuṁḍi Ēṁḍō kaṁṭikipedda Iṁṭiki
mūṁḍu rūkalnu baṁga Iṁṭiki reṁḍu
rūkhala lekhaṁnu kaḍavaperūkalekhanu
ḍḍuvāru yallappaḍikinnipeṭṭi koṭaṭaṁgu
kānikelu sarvamunnu mānitimi Āku
trāyaṁnū javiśistu bīḍu śistuku
gutalārniyi vimānitimi ciṁkaṭitappa
mānitimiyiṁdduku yavvaru tappinā
nu gaṁggaka¨rttanu gōvu brāṁhmala
nu vadhiṁccina pāpānaṁ bōvuvāru
pēṭalōni vāru yemi kala
haṁ peṭṭukoṁnnānu tama
rē tī¨rccukōnuvārugā
ni nagarivāru tī¨rccapani
lēdu
Digital edition of SII 40.236 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
